# Byte-compiled / optimized files (This covers __pycache__)
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd

# Virtual Environments (where your packages get installed)
venv/
env/
.venv/

# Secrets and environment variables
.env

# IDE and Editor configuration folders
.vscode/
.idea/

# Operating System generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db
